title: BEM-841 option A step2
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 08:05 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b840=load('governance/state/bem840_execute_after_bem839.json')
status_in=b840.get('status','unknown')
missing=b840.get('current_missing',[])
# Execute option A as a simple step plan: fix first missing proof only.
if status_in=='triad_present_process_protocol' or not missing:
    status='step2_ready_to_process_protocol'
    next_action='read real Claude response and write agreed protocol'
elif missing[0]=='workflow_dispatch_results':
    status='step2_repair_dispatch_results_selected'
    next_action='create/verify workflow_dispatch_results proof before runtime work'
elif missing[0]=='claude_runtime_state':
    status='step2_repair_runtime_state_selected'
    next_action='verify dispatcher dispatch result then patch Claude runtime-state writer'
else:
    status='step2_repair_real_response_selected'
    next_action='patch Claude response writer/provider and retry real Claude answer'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'bem840_status':status_in,'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_option_a_step2.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_option_a_step2.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute Option A Step 2 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Option A step 3: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841 OPTION A STEP 2'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_execute_option_a_step2.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_option_a_step2.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Option A step 2: read BEM-840, selected the first missing proof and wrote the next concrete action')
